name: Partially my fault falling off ladder on job, still get money?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault falling off ladder on job, still get money?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes for workers' comp**—no-fault system.[1] Suits reduce by your % fault.

Utah comparative negligence.

- Admit nothing early.
- Evidence shows setup issues.
- Comp unaffected.

Focus on employer duty.
